Read the notice and choose where you would see it:

«For children under 7.»
justificacion: La indicación 'For children under 7' (para niños menores de 7 años) se encuentra en la caja de un juego (game box).

enunciado:
Read the notice and choose where you would see it:

«Please clean your desk at the end of the school day.»
justificacion: La instrucción de limpiar el escritorio (clean your desk) se encuentra en un salón de clases (classroom).

enunciado:
Complete the conversation:

A:  "I don't like meatballs. "
B:  " "
justificacion: La respuesta adecuada a 'No me gustan las albóndigas' es sugerir otra comida: 'Have some chicken' (Come un poco de pollo).

enunciado:
Complete the conversation:

A:  "Would you like an apple? "
B:  " ________ "
justificacion: La pregunta 'Would you like an apple?' (¿Te gustaría una manzana?) es una oferta. La respuesta adecuada es 'Yes, please' (Sí, por favor).

enunciado:
Complete the conversation:

A:  "I think Charlie's is the best cafe in town! "
B:  " ____________________ "
justificacion: La respuesta lógica a 'Creo que Charlie's es el mejor café de la ciudad' es preguntar 'Is it near?' (¿Está cerca?).

enunciado:
Complete the conversation:

A:  "I met my new neighbor yesterday. She's a Brazilian singer. "
B:  " ____________________ "
justificacion: La respuesta adecuada a 'Es una cantante brasileña' es 'Awesome!' (¡Increíble!) como expresión de sorpresa y admiración.

enunciado:
Complete the conversation:

A:  "Are you going to the gym tonight? "
B:  " ____________________ "
justificacion: La pregunta 'Are you going to the gym tonight?' (¿Vas al gimnasio esta noche?) se responde con 'Maybe tomorrow' (Tal vez mañana).

enunciado:
Read the text and choose the correct word:

The Golden Gate Bridge is a well-known bridge that crosses the sea. Once the bridge was ______ in 1937.
justificacion: La oración está en voz pasiva y en tiempo pasado. La forma correcta es el participio pasado del verbo 'finish', que es 'finished'.

enunciado:
Read the text and choose the correct word:

They just wanted to cross the ______ bridge in the world.
justificacion: Se necesita el superlativo 'tallest' (el más alto) porque se refiere a 'in the world' (en el mundo).

enunciado:
Read the text and choose the correct word:

Joseph Strauss and most of the engineers who were in the project, spent some months ______ on something which could actually hold the  long heavy cables.
justificacion: Después de la expresión 'spent some months' se usa el gerundio 'deciding' (decidiendo).

enunciado:
Read the text and choose the correct word:

Joseph Strauss and most of the engineers who were in the project, spent some months deciding on something which could actually hold t he long heavy cables of the bridge  .
justificacion: El pronombre reflexivo para 'the bridge' (cosa) es 'itself' (sí mismo).

enunciado:
Read the text and choose the correct word:

The engineers ______ agreed the colors of the bridge should be red and orange.
justificacion: El adverbio 'also' (también) se usa para añadir información sobre lo que los ingenieros acordaron.

enunciado:
Read the text and choose the correct word:

People thought that these colors were ______ easy to see and they were similar to the colors of other places.
justificacion: 'Quite' (bastante) se usa para modificar el adjetivo 'easy' (fácil).

enunciado:
Read the text and choose the correct word:

People thought that these colors were quite easy to see and they were similar to the colors of other places ______ the city.
justificacion: La preposición 'around' (alrededor de) indica ubicación en relación con la ciudad.

enunciado:
Read the text and choose the correct word:

People can cross it by car or motorbike ______ time.
justificacion: 'Any time' significa 'en cualquier momento'.

enunciado:
Read the text and choose the correct word:

Britain is obviously ______ from its neighbors.
justificacion: La forma correcta es el participio pasado 'separated' (separado) para describir el estado de estar separado.

enunciado:
Read the text and choose the correct word:

This is the reason why the British consider ______ countries so 'different'.
justificacion: 'Other countries' significa 'otros países'.

enunciado:
Read the text and choose the correct word:

It's ______ a strange situation.
justificacion: 'Quite' (bastante) se usa para modificar el adjetivo 'strange' (extraño).

enunciado:
Read the text and choose the correct word:

So let me ______ you about it.
justificacion: Después de 'let me' se usa el verbo en forma base: 'tell'.

enunciado:
Read the text and choose the correct word:

Britain's borders were created ______ nature.
justificacion: La preposición 'by' se usa para indicar el agente que realiza la acción.

enunciado:
Read the text and choose the correct word:

If you want to go abroad, you can't do it ______ you do it by ship, plane or train.
justificacion: 'Unless' (a menos que) introduce la condición necesaria para ir al extranjero.

enunciado:
Read the text and choose the correct word:

You can't just drive or walk ______ the border.
justificacion: 'Across the border' significa 'a través de la frontera'.

enunciado:
Read the text and choose the correct word:

Of course, Great Britain has ______ some more differences for years.
justificacion: La forma correcta del presente perfecto es 'has created' (ha creado).

enunciado:
Read the text and choose the correct word:

  out with friends in 'pubs' also makes them really special.
justificacion: El gerundio 'Hanging' (salir) se usa como sujeto de la oración.

enunciado:
Read the text about the Empire State Building and answer:

What's the author's purpose in this article?

opciones.A: to compare old and new buildings.
opciones.B: to describe the history of the building.
opciones.C: to show how valuable his school was.
opciones.D: to give practical information for visitors.

justificacion: El texto proporciona información práctica para visitantes: sobre boletos, pisos, horarios y clima.

enunciado:
Read the text about the Empire State Building and answer:

What can a reader find out from this text?

opciones.A: The writer had a wide variety of classes.
opciones.B: His education was influenced by school colors.
opciones.C: The school was in the countryside.

justificacion: El texto menciona que aprendieron de todo, desde cómo ingresar a la universidad hasta cómo cuidar árboles.

enunciado:
Read the text about the Empire State Building and answer:

How has his school changed?

opciones.A: The color of its building is similar to other schools.
opciones.B: It is good but it was better.
opciones.C: The new building encourages knowledge better.

justificacion: El texto dice: 'Llanwern is now much smaller than it used to be' (ahora es mucho más pequeño de lo que solía ser).

enunciado:
Match the description with the correct animal:

It is a very tall animal with a long neck. It eats leaves from tall trees.
justificacion: La jirafa (giraffe) es un animal muy alto con cuello largo que come hojas de árboles altos.

enunciado:
Match the description with the correct animal:

It is the largest animal on Earth. It lives in the ocean and eats krill.
justificacion: La ballena (whale) es el animal más grande de la Tierra y vive en el océano.

enunciado:
Match the description with the correct animal:

It is a small animal that can fly. It is active at night and eats insects.
justificacion: El murciélago (bat) es un animal pequeño que vuela, es activo de noche y come insectos.

enunciado:
Read the notice and choose where you would see it:

«SALE: UP TO 50% OFF ON ALL ITEMS»
justificacion: Un aviso de rebajas (SALE) con descuentos se encuentra en una tienda (shop).

enunciado:
Read the notice and choose where you would see it:

«NO PARKING. VIOLATORS WILL BE TOWED.»
justificacion: Un aviso de 'No estacionar' se encuentra en la calle (street).

enunciado:
Read the notice and choose where you would see it:

«PLEASE QUIET. PATIENTS RESTING.»
justificacion: Un aviso de silencio para pacientes descansando se encuentra en un hospital.

enunciado:
Complete the conversation:

A:  "How was your weekend? "
B:  " ____________________ "
justificacion: La pregunta 'How was your weekend?' (¿Cómo fue tu fin de semana?) se responde con 'It was great, thanks!' (Fue genial, ¡gracias!).

enunciado:
Complete the conversation:

A:  "Could you help me with this? "
B:  " ____________________ "
justificacion: La respuesta adecuada a 'Could you help me?' (¿Podrías ayudarme?) es 'Of course, no problem' (Claro, no hay problema).

enunciado:
Complete the conversation:

A:  "What time is the movie? "
B:  " ______________________ "
justificacion: La pregunta 'What time is the movie?' (¿A qué hora es la película?) se responde con 'It starts at 8 PM' (Comienza a las 8 PM).

enunciado:
Choose the correct word to complete the sentence:

I ______ to the store yesterday and bought some milk.
justificacion: El pasado simple de 'go' es 'went'. 'Yesterday' indica tiempo pasado.

enunciado:
Choose the correct word to complete the sentence:

She ______ already ______ her homework when I called her.
justificacion: El pasado perfecto 'had finished' se usa para una acción completada antes de otra en el pasado.

enunciado:
Choose the correct word to complete the sentence:

This book is ______ than the one I read last week.
justificacion: El comparativo de superioridad 'more interesting' se usa para comparar dos cosas.

enunciado:
Choose the correct preposition to complete the sentence:

I'm interested ______ learning French.
justificacion: La expresión correcta es 'interested in' + gerundio.

enunciado:
Choose the correct word to complete the sentence:

You ______ wear a helmet when you ride a bike.
justificacion: 'Must' expresa obligación o necesidad.

enunciado:
Choose the correct word to complete the sentence:

I was tired, ______ I went to bed early.
justificacion: 'So' (así que) indica consecuencia: estaba cansado, así que me fui a la cama temprano.

enunciado:
Choose the correct word to complete the sentence:

The letter ______ by the secretary yesterday.
justificacion: La voz pasiva en pasado simple es 'was written'.

enunciado:
Read the text and answer the question:

«The Amazon rainforest is home to millions of species of plants and animals. It produces about 20% of the world's oxygen. However, defore station is destroying large areas of this forest every year.»

What is the main idea of the text?

opciones.B: The Amazon is being destroyed by deforestation.
opciones.C: The Amazon has many animal species.
opciones.D: The Amazon is important but endangered.

justificacion: El texto presenta la importancia de la Amazonía y la amenaza de la deforestación, lo que se resume en 'importante pero en peligro'.

enunciado:
Read the text and answer the question:

«Climate change is one of the biggest challenges facing humanity. Rising temperatures are causing ice caps to melt, sea levels to rise, a nd extreme weather events to become more common.»

What is one effect of climate change mentioned in the text?
justificacion: El texto menciona que el aumento de temperaturas está causando el derretimiento de los casquetes polares (melting ice caps).

enunciado:
Read the text and answer the question:

«Many people believe that technology makes our lives easier. Smartphones allow us to communicate with anyone, anywhere. However, some exp erts argue that excessive use of technology can lead to social isolation.»

What is the main concern about technology according to the text?
justificacion: El texto menciona que algunos expertos argumentan que el uso excesivo de la tecnología puede llevar al aislamiento social (social isolation).

enunciado:
Choose the correct word to complete the sentence:

For breakfast, I usually eat cereal with ______.
justificacion: El cereal se come comúnmente con leche (milk).

enunciado:
Choose the correct word to complete the sentence:

It's very cold today. You should wear a ______.
justificacion: En un día frío, se debe usar una chaqueta (jacket) para abrigarse.

enunciado:
Choose the correct word to complete the sentence:

My mom works at a school. She is a ______.
justificacion: Una persona que trabaja en una escuela es un profesor o maestra (teacher).

enunciado:
Choose the correct word to complete the sentence:

She ______ to school every day.
justificacion: En presente simple para tercera persona (she), se agrega 's' al verbo: 'walks'.

enunciado:
Choose the correct word to complete the sentence:

I ______ a book at the moment.
justificacion: 'At the moment' (en este momento) indica presente continuo: 'am reading'.

enunciado:
Choose the correct word to complete the sentence:

We ______ to the beach tomorrow if the weather is nice.
justificacion: 'Tomorrow' indica futuro, por lo que se usa 'will go'.

enunciado:
Choose the correct word to complete the sentence:

This is my sister. ______ name is Maria.
justificacion: El pronombre posesivo para 'my sister' (femenino) es 'Her'.

enunciado:
Choose the correct word to complete the sentence:

I saw ______ interesting movie last night.
justificacion: Se usa 'an' antes de palabras que comienzan con vocal (interesting).

enunciado:
Choose the correct word to complete the sentence:

I wanted to go to the party, ______ I was too tired.
justificacion: 'But' (pero) se usa para expresar contraste entre dos ideas.

enunciado:
Read the text and answer the question:

«Tom arrived late to the meeting. He apologized to his boss and explained that the traffic was terrible.»

Why was Tom late?
justificacion: El texto dice explícitamente que el tráfico era terrible (the traffic was terrible).

enunciado:
Read the text and answer the question:

«Maria looked at her watch and ran to the bus stop. The bus was already leaving.»

What happened?
justificacion: El texto dice que el autobús ya se estaba yendo (was already leaving), lo que indica que María lo perdió (missed the bus).
